titleZh: 公司法修订后董监高忠实勤勉义务实操解读（1）
titleEn: Practical Analysis of Duties and Liabilities of Directors, Supervisors and Senior Management after the Company Law Amendment (Part I)
abstractZh: 以新《公司法》修订条文为主线，讨论董监高义务范围变化与实践中易发的履职瑕疵风险。
abstractEn: Discusses the post-amendment expansion of senior officers’ duties and the most frequent compliance risks in corporate operations.
